interface.name: WEC_WeatherForecast_Form
interface.definition: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_formLayout"( titleBar: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_headerTemplateSimple"( title: "Create / Update WeatherForecast", secondaryText: "Fill in the fields below and click Save." ), contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_textField"(label: "cityName", value: ri!record.cityName, saveInto: ri!record.cityName, required: true), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "longitude", value: ri!record.longitude, saveInto: ri!record.longitude), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "latitude", value: ri!record.latitude, saveInto: ri!record.latitude), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "temperature", value: ri!record.temperature, saveInto: ri!record.temperature), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "temperatureMin", value: ri!record.temperatureMin, saveInto: ri!record.temperatureMin), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "temperatureMax", value: ri!record.temperatureMax, saveInto: ri!record.temperatureMax), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "feelsLike", value: ri!record.feelsLike, saveInto: ri!record.feelsLike), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_integerField"(label: "pressure", value: ri!record.pressure, saveInto: ri!record.pressure), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_integerField"(label: "humidity", value: ri!record.humidity, saveInto: ri!record.humidity), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_textField"(label: "weatherCondition", value: ri!record.weatherCondition, saveInto: ri!record.weatherCondition, required: true), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_paragraphField"(label: "weatherDescription", value: ri!record.weatherDescription, saveInto: ri!record.weatherDescription, height: "SHORT"), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_textField"(label: "weatherIcon", value: ri!record.weatherIcon, saveInto: ri!record.weatherIcon, required: false), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_floatingPointField"(label: "windSpeed", value: ri!record.windSpeed, saveInto: ri!record.windSpeed), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_integerField"(label: "windDegree", value: ri!record.windDegree, saveInto: ri!record.windDegree), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_integerField"(label: "cloudiness", value: ri!record.cloudiness, saveInto: ri!record.cloudiness), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dateTimeField"(label: "forecastTimestamp", value: ri!record.forecastTimestamp, saveInto: ri!record.forecastTimestamp) }, buttons: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonLayout"( primaryButtons: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"(label: "Save", submit: true, style: "PRIMARY") }, secondaryButtons: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_buttonWidget_v1"(label: "Cancel", value: true, saveInto: ri!cancel, submit: true, validate: false) } ) )
